acquisition method: used DIA proteomic to investigate potential adhesion/invasion related factors
alkylation reagent: blocked using 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) and 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA)
alkylation concentration: blocked using 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) and 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA)
cleavage agent: Trypsin was added to each sample at a ratio of 1:50 (mass/mass)
collision energy: the normalized collision energy was 27 eV
fractionation method: separated into three fractions using a modified high-pH reversed-phase (High-pH RP) method
instrument: using Q Exactive HF (Bremen, Thermo Fisher)
